description: Zero-dependency Python CLI tool for agencies to track project margins, budget burn rates, and client profitability. Features interactive HTML dashboard, CSV exports, and customizable settings.
features: Project budget tracking with margin calculations
Time entry logging with cost vs bill rate tracking
Interactive HTML dashboard with visual health indicators
Customizable settings (bill rate, overhead, target margin)
framework: P.R.O.F.I.T. — Project Revenue & Operational Financial Intelligence Tracker
author: AI Revenue Toolkit
